Put manually curated scenic guide images here.

Suggested filenames for current hot destinations:
- 01-tianchi.jpg
- 02-kanas.jpg
- 03-sayram.jpg
- 05-nalati.jpg
- 09-kashgar-old-city.jpg

Current safety map page will prefer these local files when present.
Recommended image format:
- jpg or png
- vertical long image or clear square crop
- keep labels readable on mobile

If you later want per-image source notes, add them in `common/destination-data.js`.
